text:
Hannah is back 🎤
Hannah Montana has returned to our screens for a 20th anniversary special.
The series special premiered on Monday night in Los Angeles, where Miley Cyrus wore a blonde wig and printed top in a nostalgic nod to her TV alter ego.
Miley Cyrus was just 13 years old when Hannah Montana started its four-season run on television, and the hit Disney show propelled her into stardom.
